item.title: Reviving a WW1 Fighter Plane After 15 Years
item.description: A look at the effort to revive a WW1 fighter plane after 15 years. The video follows the process and the question of whether it will start. What do you think?

media:content.media:title: Reviving a WW1 Fighter Plane After 15 Years
media:content.media:description: A look at the effort to revive a WW1 fighter plane after 15 years. The video follows the process and the question of whether it will start. What do you think?

item.title: Cheapest 421 Stranded Me!
item.description: An aviation project takes an unexpected turn when an affordable 421 aircraft experiences problems away from home. The video follows the troubleshooting process, repair challenges, and lessons learned. What would you check first after an unexpected breakdown?

media:content.media:title: Cheapest 421 Stranded Me!
media:content.media:description: An aviation project takes an unexpected turn when an affordable 421 aircraft experiences problems away from home. The video follows the troubleshooting process, repair challenges, and lessons learned. What would you check first after an unexpected breakdown?

item.title: From Mess to Magic: $59 Tool Transforms Wires
item.description: A look at how a $59 tool helped turn a messy wire setup into a cleaner result. The video focuses on the transformation and the practical use of the tool. What do you think of the change?

media:content.media:title: From Mess to Magic: $59 Tool Transforms Wires
media:content.media:description: A look at how a $59 tool helped turn a messy wire setup into a cleaner result. The video focuses on the transformation and the practical use of the tool. What do you think of the change?

item.title: Top 10 Fastest and Cheapest Family Airplanes
item.description: A look at ten airplanes that aim to balance speed and affordability for family use. The video covers aircraft choices, practical considerations, and commentary on what makes each option stand out.

media:content.media:title: Top 10 Fastest and Cheapest Family Airplanes
media:content.media:description: A look at ten airplanes that aim to balance speed and affordability for family use. The video covers aircraft choices, practical considerations, and commentary on what makes each option stand out.

item.title: Fuel Leak Alert: Fixing the Issue
item.description: A maintenance project focused on diagnosing and repairing a fuel leak on an aircraft. The video follows the inspection process, repair work, and safety checks before returning the aircraft to service. What’s the first thing you would inspect when tracking down a fuel leak?

media:content.media:title: Fuel Leak Alert: Fixing the Issue
media:content.media:description: A maintenance project focused on diagnosing and repairing a fuel leak on an aircraft. The video follows the inspection process, repair work, and safety checks before returning the aircraft to service. What’s the first thing you would inspect when tracking down a fuel leak?

item.title: 300MPH Airplane Barn Find
item.description: A look at a high-performance aircraft discovered after years in storage. The video explores its condition, history, and the work needed to determine whether it can return to flight. What would you inspect first on a long-stored aircraft?

media:content.media:title: 300MPH Airplane Barn Find
media:content.media:description: A look at a high-performance aircraft discovered after years in storage. The video explores its condition, history, and the work needed to determine whether it can return to flight. What would you inspect first on a long-stored aircraft?

item.title: From Dust to Skies: Abandoned Airplane Revival
item.description: A look at the restoration of a 37-year-abandoned airplane, with aviation-focused commentary and storytelling around the aircraft’s return to form. What stood out most to you?

media:content.media:title: From Dust to Skies: Abandoned Airplane Revival
media:content.media:description: A look at the restoration of a 37-year-abandoned airplane, with aviation-focused commentary and storytelling around the aircraft’s return to form. What stood out most to you?

item.title: Surprising a Friend With a Free Airplane
item.description: A friend receives the surprise of a lifetime when they're gifted an airplane, leading to an unforgettable reaction and a memorable aviation moment.

media:content.media:title: Surprising a Friend With a Free Airplane
media:content.media:description: A friend receives the surprise of a lifetime when they're gifted an airplane, leading to an unforgettable reaction and a memorable aviation moment.

item.title: Must You Buy a Plane Before Your First Lesson?
item.description: Do you need to own an airplane before learning to fly? This video explores what new pilots should know about flight training, aircraft access, and the costs of getting started.

media:content.media:title: Must You Buy a Plane Before Your First Lesson?
media:content.media:description: Do you need to own an airplane before learning to fly? This video explores what new pilots should know about flight training, aircraft access, and the costs of getting started.
